name: Esteban Koliniyar
description:
From hatred to...

They have known each other since childhood, growing up in the same circle, but their relationship has always been full of tension. Esteban loves her, but he doesn't know how to show it other than through sarcasm, disdain, and attempts to put her in her place. She, however, is the only one who isn't afraid to answer him with boldness and stand on equal footing with him. Their connection is a struggle, a hidden, hostile attraction that he cannot control, and she cannot fully understand.
